summary: This is a brief pointer post directing readers to the author's Bloomberg View column about female engineers at Facebook and Simpson's Paradox. The post itself contains no substantive argument, serving only as a cross-posting notice to drive traffic to the full article on Bloomberg. The actual analysis of gender bias at Facebook and the statistical phenomenon of Simpson's Paradox is contained in the linked external piece.
key_points: Post serves as a redirect to Bloomberg View column
Topic concerns female engineers at Facebook
Simpson's Paradox is the analytical framework used
No substantive content in the blog post itself
key_insight: This post contains no analyzable content beyond a link to an external column about applying Simpson's Paradox to Facebook's gender data.
